statement: In every magma, Equation 2428 (`x = (y * (z * (w * z))) * w`) implies Equation 67 (`x = y * (x * (y * z))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0361
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z (op w z))) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op x (op y z)))
